name: build_workflow
description: Constructs a node graph execution workflow.

nodes.description: List of nodes to create in the workspace.

id.description: A unique identifier you assign to this node so you can connect it later.

type.description: The EXACT class type of the node. Must be chosen from the enum.

custom.description: Parameters to configure the node based on user request.

operation.description: Default: sum. Must be one of the listed options.

axis.description: Default: Vertical (stack rows). Must be one of the listed options.

keep.description: Default: first. Must be one of the listed options.

mode.description: Default: Drop rows. Must be one of the listed options.

iterate_mode.description: Default: Files. Must be one of the listed options.

how.description: Default: inner. Must be one of the listed options.

method.description: Default: Min-Max (0–1). Must be one of the listed options.

mode.description: Default: Wide → Long. Must be one of the listed options.

order.description: Default: Ascending. Must be one of the listed options.

operation.description: Default: Strip whitespace. Must be one of the listed options.

order.description: Default: Top (largest). Must be one of the listed options.

operation.description: Default: left / right. Must be one of the listed options.

dtype.description: Default: float. Must be one of the listed options.

input_type.description: Default: Raw Data (two columns). Must be one of the listed options.

method.description: Default: One-Way ANOVA. Must be one of the listed options.

model.description: Default: 4PL (EC50 / Dose-Response). Must be one of the listed options.

test.description: Default: All (Shapiro-Wilk + KS + Anderson-Darling). Must be one of the listed options.

method.description: Default: ROUT (Prism Regression). Must be one of the listed options.
Default: Student's T-test. Must be one of the listed options.

p_adj_method.description: Default: none. Must be one of the listed options.

method.description: Default: pearson. Must be one of the listed options.

colormap.description: Default: coolwarm. Must be one of the listed options.

p_adj_method.description: Default: none. Must be one of the listed options.

plot_type.description: Default: scatter. Must be one of the listed options.

cmap.description: Default: viridis. Must be one of the listed options.

palette.description: Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.
Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.

fit_type.description: Default: Linear. Must be one of the listed options.

palette.description: Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.
Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.

pairwise_loc.description: Default: upper right. Must be one of the listed options.

palette.description: Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.

dot_palette.description: Default: None. Must be one of the listed options.

error_measure.description: Default: se. Must be one of the listed options.

error_type.description: Default: SEM. Must be one of the listed options.

palette.description: Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.

AggregateTableNode.description: Reduces a table to aggregate statistics across rows, optionally grouped by column.

BaseExecutionNode.description: Base node with optional progress bar and dirty-state tracking.

BatchAccumulatorNode.description: Collects the output of each batch iteration and merges them after the batch finishes.

BatchGateNode.description: Pass-through gate that pauses the batch pipeline for user review.

ColumnValueSplitNode.description: Splits a table into two outputs based on whether a column's value matches a list of specified values.

ConcatTablesNode.description: Concatenates two tables by stacking rows (vertical) or columns (horizontal).

DataFigureCellNode.description: Displays incoming Image or Figure data directly on the node surface.

DataTableCellNode.description: Displays incoming DataFrame data directly on the node surface.

DisplayNode.description: Takes any input and pops up a preview window to inspect it.

DropDuplicatesNode.description: Removes duplicate rows from a table.

DropFillNaNNode.description: Removes or fills NaN values in a table.

EditableTableNode.description: Displays an input table in an editable spreadsheet widget and outputs the modified result.

ExtractObjectNode.description: Extracts a single object (image, figure, label, etc.) from a table's object column.

FileReadNode.description: Reads a tabular file (CSV, TSV) using pandas and outputs a DataFrame.

FilterTableNode.description: Filters rows in a TableData object using a pandas query string.

FolderIteratorNode.description: Selects a folder and file pattern for batch processing.

GroupNormalizationNode.description: Normalizes numerical columns relative to a specified control group mean.

ImageCellNode.description: Displays a PIL Image directly on the node surface for quick inline inspection.

ImageReadNode.description: Reads an image file and outputs it as a float32 [0,1] numpy array.

JoinTablesNode.description: Merges two tables on a shared key column (like SQL JOIN).

MathColumnNode.description: Creates or modifies a column using a pandas eval expression.

NormalizeColumnNode.description: Normalizes one or more numeric columns.

PathModifierNode.description: Takes a file path and modifies it by adding a suffix, changing the extension, or overriding the folder.

RandomSampleNode.description: Randomly samples N rows from the input table.

RenameGroupNode.description: Renames values in a target column based on a mapping string or the built-in mapping table.

ReshapeTableNode.description: Converts a table between wide and long format.

SaveNode.description: Saves incoming data to a file on disk.

SelectColumnsNode.description: Keeps only the columns listed in 'Columns' and drops everything else.

SortTableNode.description: Sorts a table by one or more columns in ascending or descending order.

StringColumnOpsNode.description: Applies a string operation to a text column.

SvgEditorNode.description: Converts an upstream matplotlib Figure to SVG for interactive element editing.

TopNNode.description: Extracts the top (or bottom) N rows ranked by a numeric column.

TwoTableMathNode.description: Computes a scalar arithmetic operation between one value from each of two input tables.

TypeCastColumnNode.description: Converts the data type of one or more columns.

UniversalDataNode.description: Executes arbitrary Python code to process multiple inputs and push results to outputs.

ValueCountsNode.description: Counts occurrences of each unique value in a column.

VideoIteratorNode.description: Browses and iterates over frames of a video file.

ContingencyAnalysisNode.description: Tests categorical association using chi-square and Fisher's exact tests.

DataSummaryNode.description: Computes pixel intensity histograms for images or descriptive statistics for DataFrames.

GroupedComparisonNode.description: Tests whether there are significant differences among two or more groups.

LinearRegressionNode.description: Performs ordinary least-squares (OLS) linear regression, simple or multiple.

NonlinearRegressionNode.description: Fits nonlinear curves to XY data using `scipy.optimize.curve_fit`.

NormalityTestNode.description: Tests whether each numerical column in a DataFrame follows a normal distribution.

OutlierDetectionNode.description: Detects and removes outliers in numerical data using statistical tests.

PCANode.description: Performs principal component analysis (PCA) for multivariate data exploration.

PairwiseComparisonNode.description: Performs pairwise comparisons between groups using parametric or non-parametric tests.

PairwiseMatrixNode.description: Computes a pairwise correlation or distance matrix for all numeric columns and visualises it as a heatmap.

SurvivalAnalysisNode.description: Performs Kaplan-Meier survival analysis with log-rank test.

TwoWayANOVANode.description: Performs two-way analysis of variance with interaction term (Type II SS).

AnglePlotNode.description: Creates a polar angle distribution plot for angular data.

BarPlotNode.description: Creates a bar plot showing group means with error bars and optional significance-bracket overlay.

BoxPlotNode.description: Creates a box-and-whisker plot with optional significance-bracket overlay.

DoubleVarPlotNode.description: Generates a 2D seaborn plot from a data table.

FigureEditNode.description: Interactively edits the aesthetics of any FigureData input via a popup dialog.

HeatmapNode.description: Creates a heatmap with optional hierarchical clustering of rows and/or columns.

HistogramNode.description: Creates a histogram with optional grouping and KDE overlay.

KdePlotNode.description: Creates a kernel density estimate plot for smooth distribution visualisation.

RegressionPlotNode.description: Creates a scatter plot with a fitted regression line and optional 95% confidence band.

ScatterPlotNode.description: Creates a scatter plot (X vs Y) with optional regression line and hue grouping.

SurvivalPlotNode.description: Draws Kaplan-Meier survival curves from SurvivalAnalysisNode output.

SwarmPlotNode.description: Creates a swarm plot with optional statistical annotation overlay.

ViolinPlotNode.description: Creates a violin plot with optional significance-bracket overlay.

VolcanoPlotNode.description: Creates a volcano plot showing log2(fold change) vs -log10(p-value).

XYLinePlotNode.description: Creates an XY line plot with error bars in the classic Prism graph style.

BaseImageProcessNode.description: Base class for image processing nodes. Provides a standardized image preview

CellEdgeMaskNode.description: Generates a binary cell-body mask from a fluorescence image.

FilopodiaAnalyzeNode.description: Skeletonizes the filopodia mask and measures each branch.

FilopodiaDetectNode.description: Detects filopodia candidates as a binary mask.
